caption: A woman with short dark hair and glasses is centered against a plain black background, appearing as a presenter. She wears a light green top with an embroidered neckline and a dark beaded necklace. In the first frame, she is speaking with her hands resting below the frame. As the sequence progresses, she begins using hand gestures to emphasize her points, lifting her hands and moving them in small circular motions in front of her chest. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her neckline. In the lower-left corner of each frame, there is a circular logo accompanied by the text "NPTEL". The lighting remains consistent across the frames, focusing on the woman as she continues to speak and gesture throughout the short clip.
